posts.name: Sipcode

posts.description: Context hygiene for Claude Code. Caps verbose tool output and dedupes same-session re-reads so the model sees signal, not noise. Anthropic measures 29% quality lift from cleaner context. Proof: 62.6% median tool-output savings on a locked 20-task benchmark. MIT.

posts.name: Conduit
posts.tagline: Fix the tool-list bloat slowing your AI agent
posts.description: Your agent got slower the more MCP servers you added, and it's not the model. Every server dumps its whole tool list into context on every request: 3 servers cost ~24k tokens before you even say hi. Conduit puts them behind one local gateway that exposes 3 meta-tools the agent searches on demand. Measured: 97% less tool overhead per request, ~90% fewer tokens, same task success. Cloud or local, one tool or five. Keys in your OS keychain. Free and open source.

makers.name: Tyler
makers.headline: Cybersecurity vet turned AI solo builder

Unlike static scanners, BestDefense validates exploits through execution, cuts false positives, and helps developers move from finding issues to fixing them faster.

posts.name: SocialLife Diary: Your Social Timeline

posts.description: Remember every meetup. Understand your social life. Track meetups with photos, locations, people, tags, mood emojis, ratings, spending, and drinks. Build a timeline of your social life and share memories to social media. Discover who you see most, your favorite places, who makes you happiest, where your money goes, and how your social habits change over time. 100% private. Everything stays on your device. No account needed. 7-day free trial, then $5 lifetime. iPhone only.

makers.name: Jelena Popovic
makers.headline: I build apps I actually need.

posts.name: Trovr
posts.tagline: Job alerts from employer career pages, not job boards
posts.description: Trovr monitors employer career pages directly and emails you the instant a new job posts — before it ever reaches Indeed or LinkedIn. Built for trade and utility workers chasing lineman, electrician, and apprenticeship openings where timing matters. Pick your employers, set keyword filters, get notified in minutes instead of days. No more refreshing 15 different career pages by hand.

posts.name: Memiry
posts.tagline: Agents that call to check in on productivity and brain state
posts.description: AI agents that call you to check in on productivity, cognitive health, wake drift, schedule, and screen time use. Get focused and protect your day's health. Free to use.

posts.name: BugNBrag
posts.tagline: Start your next sprint retrospective in under 30 seconds.
posts.description: Run sprint retrospectives without the friction. Create a session in under 30 seconds, share a join code, and collaborate in real time. Built-in templates, voting, chat, timers, icebreakers, and follow-up tracking help teams capture ideas and carry action items into future retrospectives. Free to use, no account required, and no setup needed.

posts.name: DataraIMG
posts.tagline: Convert any image, instantly!
posts.description: Hey Product Hunt 👋 DataraIMG is a free-forever, native image converter for macOS & Windows. Drag in any file and convert it in seconds — 8 formats, every direction: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF, HEIC, GIF, SVG, BMP. • Batch-convert whole folders in parallel • Resize, quality control, strip EXIF/GPS • HEIC → JPEG with no Apple tools • Built in Go, not Electron — launches in under a second No subscription, no trial, no feature gates. What do you currently use to convert images?

posts.name: Watch Later Synthesizer
posts.tagline: Triage your YouTube Watch Later pile inside Obsidian
posts.description: Not did you watch everything — but what did you miss worth watching? Clip YouTube videos into Obsidian and your "watch later" folder becomes a graveyard. This plugin triages it: a watch-or-skip verdict per video, the recurring themes across your pile, a conservative "safe to delete" list, plus a flag for stale time-sensitive videos. Triage, not summaries. Bring your own AI key. No server, no account, no subscription. Plugin installs free from the Obsidian directory; one-time Pro license.

posts.name: Strava Widget
posts.tagline: Showcase your strava activities — in tailor-made widget!
posts.description: Showcase your latest runs, rides and other activities from your strava profile — in a tailor-made handcrafted widget. 🏃 → Embeddable in a responsive iframe for your site. Looks a million times better than the native strava widget

posts.name: Piggy bank
posts.tagline: Minimalist offline savings tracker. No ads.
posts.description: Piggy Bank is a native Android app designed to help you reach your financial goals without distractions. Unlike traditional financial apps, it's completely free, works offline, and has no ads.

posts.name: ThreadHunt
posts.tagline: Finds the thread, drafts the reply, you post it by hand.
posts.description: ThreadHunt monitors Reddit, Hacker News, X, Indie Hackers, and Dev.to (with Facebook Groups and LinkedIn coming soon) for conversations where your product is a genuinely useful answer. It scores each thread so you see the best first, and drafts a reply you edit and post yourself, from your own account. Built for founders and marketers doing their own growth.

posts.name: RIIZEN
posts.tagline: A private space to dream, plan, and appreciate your trips
posts.description: A quiet iOS travel app for collecting dream destinations, planning what's next, and actually remembering where you've been. No account. No feed. Everything stays on your phone.

posts.name: Starlog
posts.tagline: Snap a receipt, it files itself in your Google Drive
posts.description: Receipt scanner and expense tracker for small businesses. Snap a receipt — Starlog sorts, categorises, and files every expense to your own Google Drive, so you don't have to think about it again until tax season.

posts.name: NEXUS
posts.tagline: AI that tries to destroy your idea before the market does
posts.description: Every AI validates your idea. NEXUS tries to destroy it. Your plan gets attacked by hundreds of AI analysts — financial, competitive, regulatory, operational — until weak assumptions collapse. What survives is worth building. It predicted WeWork's $39B collapse. Flagged Bud Light's $27B loss before launch. Called the Hormuz oil crisis before the first ship was attacked. Every claim evidence-tagged. Chat with any analyst. The due diligence that costs $50K — now from $5.

posts.name: OursCrypto Whale Monitor
posts.tagline: Track whale movements before the market reacts
posts.description: OursCrypto Whale Monitor gives you real-time alerts when large crypto wallets move significant funds across Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other major blockchains. 🐋 What it does: - Real-time whale transaction alerts - Wallet address tracking - Custom notification thresholds - Transaction history analysis Whether you're a trader or long-term investor, following the smart money helps you make better decisions. Sign up for free and start tracking whale activity today.

posts.name: SpecieSense
posts.tagline: Identify any species from a single photo
posts.description: Spotted a bug, plant, or mushroom and wondered what it is? SpecieSense identifies the species from a single photo — and shows you why: the features it matched, where it's recorded worldwide, and an honest confidence level. If it's unsure, it says so. And it never claims something is safe to eat or touch — for that it points you to a local expert. Built for the curious — gardeners, hikers, parents fielding "what's this?". Free to try, and I'd love your feedback on where it gets it wrong.

posts.name: contentcloud
posts.tagline: Your content finds itself. Finally.
posts.description: contentcloud is an AI-first Digital Asset Management platform, built from scratch, not bolted together. Smart auto-tagging and search that finds files how you'd speak means every asset is within reach. Spend more time creating, less time searching.

posts.name: Memophant
posts.tagline: Agents forget your repo. Memophant remembers.
posts.description: Native macOS app for repo-resident AI memory. Memories, wiki, design, code, tasks, sessions, documents, vendors, and templates — every tier lives in your git repo as plain markdown, exposed to every AI editor through a native MCP server, so each session starts already up to speed.

posts.name: Home Proof
posts.tagline: Privacy-first home inventory & warranty tracker for iOS
posts.description: Home Proof helps homeowners document what they own before they need to prove it for insurance claims, warranty protection, and peace of mind. Track appliances with receipts and manuals, scan purchases with on-device OCR, get warranty reminders, and export an insurance-ready PDF. No account, no cloud hoarding your documents. Everything stays on your iPhone until you choose to share.

posts.name: aiCoChef 2.0
posts.tagline: Make Better and Personalized Food Decisions
posts.description: Since our first launch, aiCoChef has evolved into a complete food decision platform. Beyond AI-powered recipes, users can evaluate foods, plan meals, generate grocery lists, manage dietary preferences, scan products for nutrition insights, and discover community recipes. This launch brings aiCoChef to iPhone and iPad, making personalized food decisions accessible across both iOS and Android.

posts.name: Prisma - Portfolio Tracker
posts.tagline: See what you own, whether it's good, and keep it private.
posts.description: Prisma pulls your transactions from multiple brokers into one portfolio, scores every holding on real fundamentals (health, growth, profitability — vs its sector and own history), and is private by design: broker statements are parsed on-device and encrypted before anything leaves your phone.

posts.name: ShipLog
posts.tagline: Your changelog, written for you.
posts.description: ShipLog automatically reads your GitHub commits, PRs, and merges, then uses AI to generate beautiful, human-friendly changelogs your users will actually read and understand. You'll get a public hosted changelog page + a clean embeddable widget you can drop directly into your own website.

posts.name: On-device AI asks why before you scroll
posts.tagline: Your apps run you on autopilot. Meridian gives you back.
posts.description: Meridian is a privacy-first Android app that puts a moment of intention between you and your most-used apps. Before you open Instagram or TikTok, Kairos, Meridian's on-device AI asks why you're there. No cloud. No data collection. No subscription. One-time purchase. Built for people who already know they have a phone problem and want a tool that respects their intelligence instead of gamifying their behavior. The AI runs entirely on your device. Your patterns stay yours.

makers.name: John F Gomez
makers.headline: Ex-Google Eng · solo building cool tech

posts.name: Peppolpdf
posts.tagline: Peppol XML into a complete, elegant and customer-ready PDF
posts.description: Convert Peppol BIS 3.0 XML invoices into modern, configurable PDFs. Peppolpdf provides complete invoice field coverage, multilingual support, customizable layouts, and GDPR-friendly stateless processing through a simple API. Designed for ERP vendors, accounting platforms, and developers who need high-quality invoice PDFs without building and maintaining their own rendering solution.

posts.name: Cepho
posts.tagline: Your IDE lives in the cloud. Code from your phone.
posts.description: Cepho syncs your Cursor or VS Code workspace to the cloud — so you can continue coding from your phone, without your PC staying on. Ask Cepho AI about your codebase, get suggestions, and apply changes directly back to your files. Everything syncs automatically. One command installs the extension. One tap connects your phone. Cloud is the truth — devices are windows.

posts.name: ZenTrip
posts.tagline: Track, split & settle group trip costs — end to end
posts.description: Group trips are amazing. Splitting money after? Not so much. 😅 ZenTrip tracks every expense, auto-splits between everyone, and lets you pay & confirm settlement inside the app — fully end to end. No spreadsheets. No WhatsApp chaos. ✅ Free to use — no credit card needed ✅ Trusted Access for non-tech-savvy members ✅ Works for trips, safaris, parties, road trips ✅ Installs like a native app — no Play Store needed ✅ PDF report ₹99 | Yearly plan ₹999 Try free → zentrip.ighosh.com

posts.name: SelfForje
posts.tagline: The app that helps you forge who you want to become
posts.description: SelfForje turns your goals, habits, and tasks into visible skill progression. Instead of tracking disconnected habits and to-dos, you build a skill tree across areas like health, career, learning, relationships, and creativity. Every action contributes to the person you're becoming. Track progress with XP, levels, streaks, reports, and heatmaps. Stay motivated through duels, leaderboards, shared skill trees and calendars. Track not just what you do, but who you're becoming.

posts.name: UniWheels
posts.tagline: The portal to find a partner to share a bike ride with
posts.description: The project is a shared bike platform designed exclusively for FH Salzburg students and staff. It enables users to connect with others who want to go on bike trips together, making it easier to find companions for rides, explore new routes, and stay active. The goal is to combine sport, mobility, and community by encouraging shared experiences, promoting a healthy lifestyle, and helping people build connections through cycling.

posts.name: TickerNote
posts.tagline: AI analyst for every U.S. listed company
posts.description: Enter any ticker and get a clean company profile: what the business does, how it makes money, who it competes with, and what risks it faces. No jargon, no spreadsheets.

posts.name: Keystead
posts.tagline: AI property management for self-managing landlords
posts.description: Keystead is property management for landlords with 1-50 units who manage their own rentals. Upload a lease PDF and AI extracts the terms with citations to the exact page. Connect your bank and rent deposits match to tenants automatically. Expenses get QuickBooks-style categorization rules, and tax time becomes a CPA-ready Schedule E export. Built by a CPA & attorney who self-manages his own rentals. $29/mo, 14-day free trial, no credit card.

posts.name: AI-Gotchi
posts.tagline: An AI pet that grows its own personality
posts.description: Raise a Tamagotchi-style AI pet — a cat, dog or robot that chats with you, remembers your conversations and grows over time. Free to start, private by default.

makers.name: Vadim Smirnov
makers.headline: The Tamagotchi that actually talks back

posts.name: euinvoice.app
posts.tagline: Invoices for freelancers, not bookkeeping software
posts.description: Free invoice generator for EU freelancers and indie devs. Gets reverse charge, VAT-exempt and standard VAT right across 7 countries, including the invoices you have to send Apple & Google. No account needed. Pro adds Factur-X (EN-16931) export.

makers.name: Anthony
makers.headline: Indie dev building small, useful apps

posts.name: EDGECONSENT
posts.tagline: Drop-in GDPR & CCPA compliance for Micro-SaaS.
posts.description: Traditional cookie banners rely on bloated client-side scripts, leading to race conditions in which trackers fire prematurely before users can even consent. EDGECONSENT fixes this at the CDN edge. It's a sub-millisecond, Cloudflare-native injector that hardcodes default "denied" states before the HTML reaches the browser. Zero databases, zero latency, zero subscriptions. Just a one-time, drop-in script for indie hackers to guarantee GDPR compliance.

posts.name: CentralTab — New Tab Browser Extension
posts.tagline: Replace your new tab with an iPad-like home screen.
posts.description: CentralTab is a New Tab Chrome Extension with an iPad-like, glassy home screen for shortcuts, folders, widgets, and beautiful wallpapers.

posts.name: Lofikofi
posts.tagline: Ambient sounds, focus timers, and planning in one workspace
posts.description: Lofikofi is a macOS productivity workspace designed to reduce setup friction before deep work. Instead of juggling Spotify, Pomodoro timers, notes apps, and task managers, it brings everything into one calm workspace. Create custom ambient soundscapes, run focus sessions, organize tasks with lightweight boards, and capture quick thoughts without losing focus. Built for developers, students, writers, and remote workers. One-time purchase. No subscriptions.

posts.name: Invoees
posts.tagline: 100% private, client-side invoice generator.
posts.description: Generate premium PDF invoices instantly in your browser. Invoees runs locally, meaning your financial data never touches our servers. Start for free, and upgrade to unlock advanced templates, GST support, and digital signatures.

posts.name: Elite Vault CMS
posts.tagline: Manage your website without editing a single line of code
posts.description: Elite Vault CMS is a Firebase-powered content management system designed for creators, entrepreneurs, and businesses. Manage product images, titles, descriptions, pricing, FAQs, payment information, and website content directly from a secure admin dashboard without coding knowledge. Fast deployment, responsive design, Firebase Authentication, and complete documentation make website management simple and efficient.

posts.name: Speechcap
posts.tagline: Mac dictation on steroids 💉 🎙️ . Local or cloud, your call
posts.description: Speechcap is an AI-powered push-to-talk dictation app for Mac that turns your voice into polished text in seconds. Choose between cloud-based processing or fully local transcription and AI cleanup with Pro, where your voice never leaves your device. Supports 89 languages, with a free tier and Pro plans starting at just $3/month.

posts.name: INVENTAR
posts.tagline: Local-first workspace for game design notes and assets
posts.description: Inventar is a local-first desktop workspace for game design notes, files, and assets. It lets you organize Markdown pages, import creative assets, preview media, and keep everything in a normal folder structure on your own device. This is an early pre-release and student project, focused on testing the core idea and collecting feedback before the full vision is built out.

posts.name: ARTCAL EVENT
posts.tagline: Discover the best art, music & film events near you
posts.description: ARTCAL EVENT is one calendar for everything happening in California's culture scene - art, music, theater, film, comedy, and festivals across LA, Orange County, San Francisco, and San Diego. Browse thousands of events by date, search by venue or artist, and find something to do this week. Free.

posts.tagline: The digital business card built for your wallet
posts.description: Create a digital business card that lives in Apple Wallet, Google Wallet, and PassMate Wallet. Share your contact details instantly via QR code and update them anytime without reprinting cards.

posts.name: K-Pockit
posts.tagline: rack every penny, anytime, anywhere
posts.description: K-Pockit is a simple and clean expense tracker designed for everyday use. 📊 Track your spending — Log income and expenses with custom categories 💱 Real-time currency rates — Built-in calculator with live exchange rates 🌍 Multi-language support — Korean, English, Japanese, Spanish 📈 Statistics — Visual overview of your spending habits Simple. Fast. Always in your pocket. 👛

posts.name: Stripe Fee Auditor
posts.tagline: See your real Stripe fee rate in 30 seconds
posts.description: Stripe says 2.9% + $0.30. I was actually paying 4.7%. The problem? Stripe's dashboard shows gross volume, not your real fee rate. International cards, FX, refunds, and small transactions quietly push it higher — but you never see it in one place. Stripe Fee Auditor fixes this: upload your Balance CSV and get your real effective rate, monthly trends, fee drivers, and savings opportunities. Without connecting your Stripe account. No OAuth. No signup. No raw CSV stored.

posts.name: Bill and Sale
posts.tagline: Make a Bill of Sale Before You Hand Over the Keys.
posts.description: Generate a state-specific motor vehicle bill of sale, collect both signatures, pay once, and download signed PDF and Word documents instantly. $9.99 per completed sale.

posts.name: ThreadCare.Health
posts.tagline: One source-linked timeline for your whole health story
posts.description: ThreadCare helps patients, caregivers, and clinicians make sense of complex health journeys. By connecting scattered medical records, symptoms, medications, and personal health notes into a source-linked timeline, it creates a clearer picture of a person’s health story. The goal is to make information easier to understand, share, and discuss with your care team. Try the demo.

posts.name: Klyverity
posts.tagline: Compliant e-signatures for regulated industries
posts.description: Klyverity is an e-signature platform purpose-built for regulated industries. Every signature is backed by an ALCOA+ audit trail with SHA-256 hash-chain verification, an RFC 3161 trusted timestamp, and a verifiable Certificate of Completion, so the proof holds up to an FDA inspection. Compliant with FDA 21 CFR Part 11, ESIGN, UETA, and eIDAS. Built for clinical research, pharma, biotech, and medical device teams.

posts.tagline: Any model as a real Claude Code teammate — no sub
posts.description: Claude Code's Dynamic Workflows, Agent Teams & Subagents only run Anthropic's models. cc-fleet lets any model with an Anthropic- or OpenAI-compatible API — DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi, Qwen, even your Codex subscription — run as a real Claude Code worker, mixed per node in one run. No Anthropic subscription needed; provider keys never touch env, argv, or shell history. Go CLI + Claude Code plugin. Apache-2.0.

posts.name: Tokenholic
posts.tagline: Your coding plan is earning you money. See exactly how much.
posts.description: A native macOS menubar app that shows your net earnings from AI coding subscriptions: what your token usage would cost at API rates, minus what you pay. Supports Claude Code and Codex. Validated against ccusage to the cent. Free and open source.

posts.name: CrossUI Studio
posts.tagline: The IDE for React - AI writes the logic, you tune the UI
posts.description: CrossUI Studio is a visual IDE for React and MUI (and shadcn/ui). Code and canvas stay in two-way sync on the same AST: edit code and the canvas updates live; click an element on the canvas, change a prop, and you get a one-line diff in the actual file-not a 200-line rewrite. The idea is simple: AI writes the logic, Studio tunes the UI. AI is great at architecture, data flow, and refactors, but bad at pixel-level UI tuning. Studio is the visual half-surgical, reviewable edits on your real code.

posts.name: AgentDraft
posts.tagline: Inbox + calendar for AI agents, without the collisions
posts.description: AgentDraft is the ops API that gives your AI agents an inbox and a calendar. Receive emails, check availability, book meetings, and reply through one service. Our race-safe engine ensures deterministic conflict resolution, so your agents never double-book each other or fight over the same calendar. Built for production with robust Python and TS SDKs. Stop worrying about scheduling collisions and start scaling your agent operations. Free to start.

posts.name: OSTDB
posts.tagline: The open video game soundtrack database
posts.description: OSTDB is a community-driven database of official video game soundtracks with direct links to Spotify and Apple Music. 🎮 900+ games in the database 🎵 Find OSTs for any game — from indie to AAA 🔗 Direct links to Spotify & Apple Music 🔌 Free public API for developers 🧩 Chrome extension that shows soundtracks directly on IGDB game pages 📝 Anyone can submit missing soundtracks No accounts needed. Just find the music and play it. Built on Cloudflare, powered by the community.

posts.name: Jabalog
posts.tagline: A private journal for your GLP-1 journey
posts.description: Most GLP-1 tracking ends up in a notes app, a spreadsheet, or a bloated app that requires a subscription. Jabalog does one thing: it tracks your injections. Log each dose, the site you used, and how you felt. Your full titration history sits in one place, so you can see if side effects line up with a dose change. Site rotation is built in, so you stop guessing which leg was last. One-time purchase, no subscription. Your data stays on your phone.

posts.name: Klyverity
posts.tagline: Compliant e-signatures for regulated industries
posts.description: Klyverity is an e-signature platform purpose-built for regulated industries. Every signature is backed by an ALCOA+ audit trail with SHA-256 hash-chain verification, an RFC 3161 trusted timestamp, and a verifiable Certificate of Completion, so the proof holds up to an FDA inspection. Compliant with FDA 21 CFR Part 11, ESIGN, UETA, and eIDAS. Built for clinical research, pharma, biotech, and medical device teams.

posts.name: LLM Governance Engine
posts.tagline: Self-hosted PII firewall for LLMs — policies, audit trail
posts.description: A robust LLM Governance & ROI Evaluation platform designed to benchmark Frontier models against local open-source models. Built with an enterprise microservices architecture and cloud-ready for Kubernetes, this tool helps organizations optimize AI spend by calculating the accuracy-vs-cost tradeoff of local vs. cloud inference - sochaty/llm-governance-engine

posts.name: Pace: Couch to 5K Run Coach
posts.tagline: Couch to 5K for people who think they can’t run
posts.description: Pace is a Couch to 5K coach for people who think they can’t run. Most beginners quit — too much too soon, or apps built for athletes. Pace uses gentle run/walk plans (including one slower than standard C25K, for anyone who’s quit before), calm audio cues, and no shame for a missed day — it just picks up where you left off. The core plan is free. No subscription; premium is a one-time unlock, yours forever. Built solo, in public, by a developer learning to run himself.

posts.description: Dedicated to all lives lost in earthquake disasters, built to honor their memory and defend life. MK Deprem Monitörü turns your phone into an offline earthquake early-warning sensor — no internet, no server, no data collection. A dual-trigger engine runs P-wave and S-wave detection in parallel on your accelerometer. Validated against real seismic data, including the Mw 7.2 Haiti earthquake.

posts.name: Speechcap
posts.tagline: Mac dictation on steroids 💉 🎙️ . Local or cloud, your call

Choose between cloud-based processing or fully local transcription and AI cleanup with Pro, where your voice never leaves your device. Supports 89 languages, with a free tier and Pro plans starting at just $3/month.

posts.name: Snap to Jira, ClickUp & More

For designers, PMs & QA who want bugs fixed the first time.

posts.name: cc-fleet
posts.tagline: Any model as a real Claude Code teammate — no sub

No Anthropic subscription needed; provider keys never touch env, argv, or shell history. Go CLI + Claude Code plugin. Apache-2.0.

A scan, personalized results, and a clear protocol for what to do next. For people with unresolved symptoms. For athletes hitting invisible walls. For anyone the system has run out of answers for.

The idea is simple: AI writes the logic, Studio tunes the UI. AI is great at architecture, data flow, and refactors, but bad at pixel-level UI tuning. Studio is the visual half-surgical, reviewable edits on your real code.

We give SMB hardware startups and mid-sized manufacturers a central, cloud-based source of truth to manage engineering data from initial concept to the factory floor.

posts.description: Your AI agent stalls on a (y/n) while you're away — TermIQ pushes it to your phone, you tap Yes/No, it keeps shipping. You never opened the laptop. (Honest caveat: the push itself isn't E2E — it carries status metadata only, never terminal contents.) Free, no card: npx @termiq/cli · termiq.io
